summary: Pattern: when renaming generated file watermarks during rebrand, detect both old and new watermarks to avoid misclassifying existing user files as non-MOM-owned.

content.what: Watermark detection must support both old and new strings during brand transitions
content.context: claude.go:135 HasWatermark() detects 'Generated by L.E.O.' in CLAUDE.md files. If changed to 'Generated by MOM' without dual detection, existing user files with old watermark stop being recognized as MOM-owned — treated as user files, backed up instead of overwritten.
content.pattern: When renaming a detection string, always detect both old and new values. HasWatermark should check: strings.Contains(data, 'Generated by L.E.O.') || strings.Contains(data, 'Generated by MOM')
